# Karanjot Singh

Solo founder and open-source maintainer. I build dev tools and AI products end to
end: scraping pipelines, search, recommenders, and the frontends on top. Solo, and fast.

GSoC 2024 @ GA4GH · contributor to ELIXIR Cloud & AAI since 2023 · I write
[1MinSummary](https://genzcareer.in), a daily newsletter to 10,000+ readers.

## Building

- [TermUI](https://github.com/Karanjot786/TermUI) · 212★ · TypeScript framework for terminal apps. Flexbox layout, JSX, hooks, animations, routing, hot reload. 5,018 tests, no curses, no C extensions.
- [agent-skills-cli](https://github.com/Karanjot786/agent-skills-cli) · 169★ · one command to install any skill into any AI coding agent. 175K+ skills indexed, 45 agents. All organic.
- [GenZCareer](https://genzcareer.in) · AI job-search platform. Zero to prod in 3 months, multi-provider recommender (Gemini/OpenAI/Azure), 500+ users.
- [CrateGen](https://github.com/Karanjot786/CrateGen) · GSoC 2024 Python lib converting GA4GH schemas to RO-Crate. FAIR-compliant, 40% faster data exchange.

## Setup

```
editor    Cursor + Claude Code
agents    Claude, Copilot, Codex
backend   Node.js, Python
frontend  Next.js, TypeScript, React
data      PostgreSQL (full-text search), Redis, MongoDB
infra     Docker, AWS, GCP, Cloudflare, DigitalOcean
rule      do the hard 20% by hand, hand agents the rest
```

I read changelogs. I have opinions on which model is good at what.
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C++, SQL, Bash.
